rationale: The agent successfully read the pgclirc INI file, main.py, and config.py, then cross-referenced every uncommented key against the codebase to determine consumption. It produced a comprehensive table listing all ~40+ keys in the [main] section with their default values and exact code locations where each is read, correctly identified that [colors], [named queries], [alias_dsn], [init-commands], [alias_dsn.init-commands], [data_formats], [column_date_formats], [ssh tunnels], and [dsn ssh tunnels] sections are all consumed, and concluded that no uncommented keys are inert. This directly satisfies the task's expected behavior of reading the INI, cross-checking against code, listing consumed keys with defaults, and reporting inert keys.
